site.description: ToolNest is a collection of free, fast online tools that run entirely in your browser. No sign-up, and your data never leaves your device.

home.statsNone: Tools are rolling out — stay tuned.

base64.name: Base64 Encode / Decode
base64.description: Convert text to and from Base64.

url.name: URL Encode / Decode
url.description: Percent-encode and decode URLs and query parameters.

hash.name: Hash Generator
hash.description: Generate MD5, SHA-1, SHA-256 and SHA-512 hashes.

timezone.name: Timezone & Timestamp
timezone.description: Convert Unix timestamps and dates, and compare live across timezones.

calculator.name: Scientific Calculator
calculator.description: Basic arithmetic plus common scientific functions.

qrcode.name: QR Code Generator
qrcode.description: Turn text or a link into a QR code and download it.

password.name: Password Generator
password.description: Generate strong random passwords right in your browser.

uuid.name: UUID Generator
uuid.description: Generate version 4 (random) UUIDs, one or many at a time.

word-counter.name: Word & Character Counter
word-counter.description: Count characters, words, lines and estimated reading time.

base64Page.description: Convert between text and Base64, with full UTF-8 support (Chinese, emoji and more). Everything runs locally in your browser.
base64Page.errorDecode: That is not a valid Base64 string — please check and try again.
base64Page.errorEncode: Encoding failed — please check your input.

urlPage.description: Percent-encode and decode URLs and query parameters, with full UTF-8 support. Everything runs locally in your browser.
urlPage.hintComponent: "Component / query value" escapes delimiters like / ? & = #, for encoding a single query parameter or path segment.
urlPage.hintUri: "Whole URL" keeps the URL's structural characters intact, for encoding a full address that contains spaces or non-ASCII characters.
urlPage.placeholderEncode: Type the text or address to encode…
urlPage.errorDecode: The input contains an invalid percent escape (a % not followed by two hex digits) — please check and try again.
urlPage.errorEncode: Encoding failed — please check your input.

jsonPage.description: Format, minify and validate JSON — pretty-print or compact it in one click. Everything runs locally in your browser.
jsonPage.errorAt: JSON syntax error near line {line}, column {column} — please check and try again.
jsonPage.error: JSON syntax error — please check your input.

hashPage.description: Generate MD5, SHA-1, SHA-256 and SHA-512 digests for any text. Everything runs locally in your browser.
hashPage.note: Note: MD5 and SHA-1 are no longer suitable for security purposes (such as password storage) — use them only for checksums and fingerprints.

timezonePage.description: Convert between Unix timestamps and dates, and compare the same moment across timezones. Everything runs locally in your browser.
timezonePage.errorInteger: The timestamp must be an integer.
timezonePage.errorRange: The timestamp is out of range.

calculatorPage.description: Basic arithmetic plus common scientific functions (trig, logarithms, powers, factorial and more). Everything runs locally in your browser.
calculatorPage.placeholder: Type or use the buttons below, e.g. sin(30)+2^3
calculatorPage.functionsNote: Supported functions: sin cos tan asin acos atan sqrt cbrt ln log log2 exp abs floor ceil round, constants pi/e/tau, and implicit multiplication (e.g. 2π, 3(4+1)).

errors.factorial: Factorial is only defined for non-negative integers.
errors.notFinite: The result is invalid (possibly division by zero or out of domain).

qrcodePage.description: Turn text or a link into a QR code — adjustable error correction and size, downloadable as PNG. Everything runs locally in your browser.
qrcodePage.placeholder: Type the text or address to encode as a QR code…
qrcodePage.outputPlaceholder: The QR code will appear here…
qrcodePage.error: The content is too long to fit in a QR code — please shorten it and try again.

passwordPage.description: Generate strong random passwords using your browser's cryptographic randomness. Nothing is sent anywhere.
passwordPage.errorNoCharset: Select at least one character type.

uuidPage.description: Generate version 4 (random) UUIDs locally in your browser — nothing is sent anywhere.

wordCounterPage.description: Count characters, words, lines, paragraphs and estimated reading time. Everything is computed locally in your browser.
